prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约255→276→431→684，呈逐年后移趋势，近4年累计后移约429名；2025年河南省首次新高考，科类改为物理类，最低位次约1917名（受护理学专业拉低），剔除护理学后核心医学专业最低位次约566–627名；2021年计划34人，2022年35人，2023年35人，2024年36人，2025年物理类44人；2026年物理类计划55人，较2025年扩招约25%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，985/211/双一流，软科主榜北京大学2026年排名第2，学校层次为国内顶尖；北京大学2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情，但整体品牌影响力仍居全国前列；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高位；未见明显投档断档记录；依托北京大学学科评估：临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A，医学学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续高热（2024年临床医学，口腔医学=72.31）；河南省2026年考生总数约120万（较2025年约90.7万增长约32%），物理类估算约73.4万人，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招25%对位次的缓解作用、河南省考生总数大幅增长约32%带来的竞争加剧、以及北大医学部顶尖学科吸引力的持续高位，在2025年基准1917名基础上，预测最低位次约2235名，区间1966–2504名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 255 → 276 → 431 → 684, showing a gradual backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 429 places over the past 4 years; in 2025, Henan Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time, changing the subject category to Physics Category, with a minimum ranking of approximately 1917 (lowered by the nursing major), and after excluding nursing, the minimum ranking for core medical majors was approximately 566–627; the enrollment plan was 34 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 44 for Physics Category in 2025; the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan is 55, an increase of about 25% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranked 2nd in 2026, making it a top-tier institution in China; Peking University's reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, involving campus safety, cafeteria, dormitory, and other public opinion issues, but its overall brand influence remains among the top in the country; it ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, and sustained high attention for application; no significant gaps in admission records have been observed; relying on Peking University's discipline evaluations: Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Nursing A+, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A, the medical disciplines are top-tier nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly popular socially (in 2024, Clinical Medicine and Stomatology = 72.31); in 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 in the Physics Category, significantly increasing the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of the significant 25% expansion in 2026 on rankings, the intensified competition due to the approximately 32% increase in total candidates in Henan Province, and the sustained high attractiveness of Peking University Health Science Center's top-tier disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 1917, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2235, with a range of 1966–2504.

- Basic Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program).

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Nursing.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1966–2504, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (five-year Clinical/Stomatology, Pharmacy Bachelor-Master, Preventive Medicine Bachelor-Master) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Bachelor-Master-Doctor continuous programs (Stomatology/Clinical/Basic Medicine) as a reach, and Tier 3 Nursing/English as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1966), you can focus on reaching for the top-tier Bachelor-Master-Doctor continuous programs.
